name: Items CRUD
description: Basic CRUD with ownership and RBAC permissions
details: A simple collection demonstrating ownership-based CRUD operations. Shows how to use ownerField for 'own' permission checks, userBound fields that auto-populate with current user ID, and immutable fields that cannot be changed after creation.
instructions: Add to schemas.ts: import { itemsSchema } from './schemas/items-schema'
Add to App.tsx: import ItemsPage from './pages/ItemsPage'
patterns: userBound: true → auto-populates with current user ID
